top_signals.title: Intel's foundry lands first named customer under CEO Lip-Bu Tan, as Fortinet signs on for security chips
top_signals.summary: Fortinet is the first announced corporate customer for Intel's foundry under CEO Lip-Bu Tan, who took over the chipmaker in March 2025.

top_signals.title: DNI nominee Clayton wins Senate panel’s approval
top_signals.summary: By a party-line vote, the Senate Intelligence Committee sent the nomination of Jay Clayton to lead ODNI to the Senate floor.
